name: LineRef Copier

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## LineRef Copier 1.0.2

This release improves reference precision for selected text.

### Changes

- Added precise column positions for single-line selections.
- Added precise start and end line-column positions for multi-line selections.
- Updated README usage examples for the three supported reference levels:
  - Cursor line: `file.md:25`
  - Single-line selection: `file.md:25:8-42`
  - Multi-line selection: `file.md:25:8-27:19`

### Reference formats

```text
filePath:lineNumber
filePath:lineNumber:startColumn-endColumn
filePath:startLine:startColumn-endLine:endColumn
